# GOAL — <goal name>

> This is the overall goal for the autopilot run (vs order.md: an order is the execution instruction for a single slice; GOAL is the finish line of the whole loop).

## Goal
One line: what must be achieved.

## Mode
- From scratch / changing existing code: <changing existing code: architecture is ensured by spec at the start (large repo → recon subagent)>
- Solo / team: <team uses the PR/CI gate>

## Done criteria (acceptance-testable, item by item)
- [ ] <e.g. the user can do X, and existing Y is not broken>
- [ ] <e.g. full regression has no new red>
- [ ] <e.g. all PRs pass CI and are merged>

## Boundary / invariants (must never break)
- <existing behavior/data/interfaces that must stay unchanged>

- <command output / PR links / review report / demo steps>
